EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user with ID {subject.account.id} generated a server ephemeral key on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} removed a server private key from a process memory on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} generated a server ephemeral key on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} removed a session private key from a process memory on host {event_src.host}
The user with ID {subject.account.id} removed a session private key from a process memory on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} removed a server private key from a process memory on host {event_src.host}
